analyzer.description: Unique identifier for the Popularity analyzer.

repository.description: The image repository that was analyzed.

available.description: True if the repository was found on Docker Hub.

pull_count.description: Total number of pulls for this repository.

star_count.description: Number of stars for this repository on Docker Hub.

description.description: Short description of the repository from Docker Hub.

last_updated.description: ISO timestamp of the last repository update.

date_registered.description: ISO timestamp of when the repository was created.

is_official.description: True if this is an official Docker Hub repository.
